seo_title: Georgia Choropleth Map – Regions & Regional Data | Regionify
seo_description: Explore Georgia's regions with an interactive choropleth map. Visualize GDP per capita, population, and economic data by administrative region. Create custom maps with Regionify.
seo_keywords: Georgia choropleth map, Georgian regions map, Georgia administrative divisions, Georgia regional GDP map, Geostat Georgia, Georgia economic map
intro_text: Georgia is a country at the crossroads of Eastern Europe and Western Asia, bordering Russia, Turkey, Armenia, and Azerbaijan. The country is divided into regions (mkhare), two autonomous republics (Adjara and Abkhazia), and the capital Tbilisi with special status. Regional economic output varies substantially — from the highly urbanized capital to mountainous rural areas — making choropleth maps an effective tool for understanding Georgia's geographic and economic diversity.
